artifact: RDTC_result (RDT-C Parts 2-3: destination result + mechanical verdict)
establishment: NOT ESTABLISHED -- output of RDTC_recompute.py; every number and the verdict below are OUTPUTS pending the verifier scenario (RDTC_verify.json all_pass=true and the human gate). Nothing here is a forecast; no date, no probability, no destination-currency guess.

branch_a_closure_test.pre_registered_rule: branch (a) is closed only pending this fetch; it REOPENS (verdict DRAWDOWN-REOPENED regardless of the ledger) if the fetched ex-gold FX-reserves line FELL roughly in step with the UST outflow over the verdict window
branch_a_closure_test.series: SAFE foreign-exchange-reserves line (ex-gold), fetched rdtc_safe_totals.csv, read directly

freeze_era_2022_03.label: context (pre-registered, labelled freeze-era; end = TIC latest)

freeze_era_to_safe_latest.label: context (freeze-era to latest fetched SAFE month)

full_2013.label: context (pre-registered full window)
full_2013.status: NOT COMPUTABLE from the fetched SAFE series (coverage 2021-12..2026-05); stated, not interpolated

calendar_end2022_to_end2025.label: context (calendar reading; reproduces the ~+$230bn search figure, now grounded)

intra_2022_dip.window: 2021-12 -> 2022-09 (trough, computed as the csv minimum over 2021-12..2022-12)
intra_2022_dip.direction_flag: coincides with the 2022 rates selloff + USD strength; direction consistent with valuation losses at ZERO selling (intra-FX-line valuation is not decomposable from SAFE data); reversed by the 2023-2025 bond rally + partial USD retreat, which flatters the FX-line rise over windows starting in 2022
intra_2022_dip.manifest_label_discrepancy: the SAFE manifest labels the trough 2022-10 (3052.427 bn); the csv minimum is 2022-09 (3028.955 bn) -- surfaced, not smoothed; the direction flag and the closure verdict are unaffected

branch_a_closure_test.verdict_axis_reading: ex-gold FX line ROSE 234.039 $bn over the verdict axis (3176.508 -> 3410.547); reference-month convention 205.781 $bn, ROSE either way -- while the China-alone UST active flow over the same axis is -284.774 $bn

gold_valuation_quantified.decomposition_convention: delta_gold_value = oz_start*(px_end-px_start) + (oz_end-oz_start)*px_end; price = SAFE-implied (gold value / gold volume, same release)
gold_valuation_quantified.implication: 40.5% of the 2021-12->2026-05 rise in TOTAL reserves is gold-price valuation on pre-held ounces -- this is why the pre-registered closure test uses the ex-gold FX-reserves line

branch_a_closure_test.intra_fx_line_caveat: inside the FX-reserves line, non-USD currency valuation and bond-price valuation are NOT decomposable from SAFE data (no monthly currency/instrument composition is published); bounded by direction statements only -- see intra_2022_dip.direction_flag
branch_a_closure_test.status: STAYS CLOSED -- confirmed by fetch (the ex-gold FX line ROSE over the verdict axis and every computable pre-registered window)

safe_manifest_cross_check.trough_label: the SAFE manifest labels the trough 2022-10 (3052.427 bn); the csv minimum is 2022-09 (3028.955 bn) -- surfaced, not smoothed; the direction flag and the closure verdict are unaffected

basis_composition.break_at: none inside window -- uniform SLT basis

treasury_lt.residual_decomposition: other_changes_busd (survey benchmark / coverage reattribution; NOT selling and NOT price): 17.154
treasury_lt.direction_rule: bond class: the valuation residual is a price effect (rates/credit). The 2022 rates selloff CUT bond values -- a negative residual is a valuation loss, NEVER counted as selling (the false-exit confound, per class).

equity_lt.residual_decomposition: other_changes_busd (survey benchmark / coverage reattribution; NOT selling and NOT price): -14.698
equity_lt.direction_rule: equity class: the valuation residual moves with the US equity market -- a positive residual is market appreciation (not buying); a negative residual is a market fall (not selling).

rule_reapplication.note: the pre-registered rule is re-applied here to every carried ledger; the recorded branch is never trusted

headline.note: the headline is the VERDICT AXIS only (fixed ex ante = the RDT-B recent-3y window verbatim); full_2013 (WITHIN-US-ROTATION both variants) and freeze_era_2022_03 (china_alone LEFT-US-SECURITIES; 3-ctry MIXED) are pre-registered CONTEXT, reported beside it, never the verdict

verdict.mechanical_basis: both custody variants on the verdict axis land LEFT-US-SECURITIES with A < 0 -- the stronger form: agencies and equities were sold alongside Treasuries, so the total US LT active outflow exceeds the UST leg alone (china_alone X = -284.774, A = -161.719, A/|X| = -0.568, residual 446.493 $bn; china+BE+LU X = -282.214, A = -44.109, A/|X| = -0.156, residual 326.323 $bn) -- AND branch (a) is closed (SAFE ex-gold FX line ROSE 234.039 $bn over the same axis): the outflow LEFT US SECURITIES while reserves did not fall; the destination currency is UNDETERMINED (the RDT-B k1 wall) -- never guessed
verdict.destination_currency: UNDETERMINED -- the RDT-B k1 wall; never guessed

expectation_evaluation.pre_registered_primary: MIXED (not favored; symmetric -- no branch privileged; the ledger decides)
expectation_evaluation.basis: A <= 0.1|X| on both custody variants -- in fact A < 0 on both (china_alone A = -161.719 $bn, china+BE+LU A = -44.109 $bn)

honest_tensions.statement: the FULL window (2013-01..2026-04) lands WITHIN-US-ROTATION on both variants (china_alone A/|X| = 1.183; pooled 0.582): the rotation-into-agencies story is REAL for 2013-2021 (china_alone cumulative agency active +502.018 $bn over the full window) and REVERSED after (verdict-axis agency active -93.849 $bn). The verdict is about the recent-3y axis, which was fixed ex ante in the pre-registration -- not chosen after seeing this contrast

the class-leg residual "left US securities" is a TIC-measured active outflow from US LT securities. WHERE it went -- non-US bonds, bank deposits, gold purchases (+56.004 $bn of volume-at-end-price per the SAFE decomposition), CIPS-settled assets -- is NOT identified by any artifact here

the published SLT identity does not close: dHoldings != net + valchg; max single-month gap 106.965 $bn (Luxembourg, total_lt, 2023-12) -- annual survey benchmark / coverage-custody reattribution, largest in the custody centers; carried as a stated data property, never read as selling or as a price move

the custody-band width persists through every term: China-alone vs China+Belgium+Luxembourg are BOTH carried on every window and the band is never collapsed; on the verdict axis the two variants happen to agree on the branch (both LEFT-US-SECURITIES) but their ledgers differ materially (A/|X| = -0.568 vs -0.156)

flipped_guard.DRAMATIZE: respected: the ledger is active-basis only; every per-class valuation residual in the carried ledgers has its direction statement, and a class-level valuation loss is never read as selling (see ledgers.*.per_class.*.direction_rule)
flipped_guard.ZERO: respected: no window beyond the three pre-registered ones is introduced; the verdict axis is the RDT-B recent-3y window verbatim, fixed before any RDT-C data

self_check.no_date_no_probability_no_currency_guess: no breaking-point date, no probability, and no destination-currency guess appear in this artifact
